summary: Enable all 11 previously excluded non-conflicting skills. Adds code-doctor, dev-browser, evaluation-harness-builder, frontend-ui-ux, git-master, github-triage, incident-commander, innovation-migration-planner, research-builder, skill-orchestrator-runtime, and token-reporter to compound-engineering.json enabled list (18 → 29 skills). Creates github-triage/SKILL.md (was in registry but had no skill file). Expands categories section with new debugging, browser, and optimization groups.

validation.notes: All added skills have existing SKILL.md files or are builtin skills. No runtime code changed. No breaking changes — purely additive.
